app.title: Reynard: A real Firefox web browser for iOS 13 or later
app.author: AbuAssar
app.description: A web browser for iOS 13 or later, built with Firefox technology
proposed_tests: Run the browser on an iOS 13 or later device
Check for browser crashes on startup
Verify browser compatibility with web APIs
